programme.desc: Herrmann feels uncomfortable when a neighborhood injury lawyer involves himself in a standard call. Station 51 receives a guest.

programme.title: Chicago P.D. S13
programme.desc: Kevin goes undercover to investigate the world of car jacking.

programme.title: BAFTA TV Awards with P&O Cruises 2026 (Repeat)
programme.desc: Celebrating the exceptional storytelling, creativity and craft of British and international television, the ceremony span awards categories across all TV genres.

programme.title: Special Forces: World's Toughest Test S3
programme.desc: The recruits face new challenges including escaping a boat crash, an intense combat exercise, battling against each other in an intense boat race, and hauling 500 pounds of supply kits up a steep mountain.

programme.title: Top Chef S23
programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Survivor S50
programme.desc: SURVIVOR 50 goes into uncharted territory and impact the players like never before. For the first time ever, the game is “In the Hands of the Fans”! the players won’t know what the fans voted for until they are competing on the island.

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a war between humans and robots with artificial intelligence, a former soldier finds the robots' secret weapon to end the conflict, an AI in the form of a child.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: As Beverly (Wendi McLendon-Covey) tries to inspire Barry (Troy Gentile) with her substitute teaching, Adam (Sean Giambrone) gets a lesson about the difficulties of being a teenage girl.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: As Hollywood's Golden Age is winding down during the summer of 1969, television actor Rick Dalton and his stunt double Cliff Booth endeavor to achieve lasting success in Hollywood while meeting several colorful characters along the way.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17
programme.desc: An elderly veteran is nowhere to be found after his house suddenly bursts into flames in Tucson, Ariz., causing authorities to kickstart a nationwide manhunt to catch a desperate couple on the run not once, but twice.

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.title: Fire Country S4
programme.desc: Bode Leone works alongside elite firefighters from Cal Fire and former friends, battling large-scale wildfires while navigating his complex past and personal relationships.

programme.title: Special Forces: World's Toughest Test S3
programme.desc: The recruits face new challenges including escaping a boat crash, an intense combat exercise, battling against each other in an intense boat race, and hauling 500 pounds of supply kits up a steep mountain.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: Dr. Evil returns from space just as British spy Austin Powers learns on his honeymoon that his wife, Vanessa is a fembot under Dr Evil's control.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.desc: A massive earthquake below the Indian Ocean unleashed the deadliest tsunami in history, killing 230,000 people. Those who were swept up in the wave had no idea of its scale, only of the devastation that unfolded before them.

But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Game On - EP 12
programme.desc: A National cricket star trades his bat for Wushu weapons in a high-flying, fist-pumping challenge. With sibling kid coaches by his side, can he slash and sweep his way to grandmaster glory?

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27 - EP 6
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 5
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 4
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa’s Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: The Cube S11 - EP 4
programme.desc: Contestants must battle to win a top prize of 250,000 pounds and each of them must complete apparently simple tasks while under the spotlight in a large perspex cube. Each task is worth a prize and the contestants will have to work hard to stay in the game.

programme.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
programme.desc: Scott Lang and Hope Van Dyne are dragged into the Quantum Realm, along with Hope's parents and Scott's daughter Cassie. Together they must find a way to escape, but what secrets is Hope's mother hiding? And who is the mysterious Kang?

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys - EP 2
programme.desc: Follow the real-life adventures of six tiny animals as they journey into the unknown – across rainforests, mountains and wetlands. The cast of animals includes a family of endangered golden-headed lion tamarins in Brazil, gymnastic bushbabies in South Africa and the rare Taiwanese Formosan pangolin – the world’s most trafficked animal.

programme.title: Half Brothers
programme.desc: Renato, a Mexican aviation exec, is shocked to learn that he has an American half-brother he never knew about: free-spirited Asher. They are forced on a road trip together, tracing the path their father took from Mexico to the U.S.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home 秘密访客
programme.desc: A story that follows a family of four leading harmonious and contented lives. When a mysterious visitor starts residing in their basement, their lives are turned upside down as strange events begin to occur.

programme.title: The Peculiar Pawnbroker - EP 13 人心鉴定师
programme.desc: Su Sheng Jie, a cobbler, pawned his tools many years ago to buy a birthday present for his grandson, and has since passed away in a car accident. Huo Chang decides to return the tools to his descendant. Mei Jie locates his descendant through social media and gets attacked when she and Huo Chang look for him in a remote factory.

programme.title: The Peculiar Pawnbroker - EP 14 人心鉴定师
programme.desc: Huo Chang passes Sheng Jie's tools to his grandson, Kai Li. He scoffs at the tools, deeming they as worthless. Huo Chang points out to him that it was his grandfather who used these tools for work to raise him after his parents were sentenced to death. Kai Li complains instead about having to suffer from misfortunes after their deaths, revealing his hatred for his parents and grandfather...

programme.title: Food Source S4 - EP 12 食在好源头
programme.desc: Want to know more about the food that you eat everyday? The popular series Food Source is back! Pornsak continues to take you on epic food adventures to various countries, in search of the origination of everyday ingredients that most of us take for granted.

programme.title: Legendary Cuisines - EP 9 传说中的料理
programme.desc: Legendary Cuisines

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 23 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Dark Angel - EP 9 黑天使
programme.desc: Alex and Ziyuan questions Shaofen's whereabouts on the night of Lin Baoxiang's disappearance. She admits that he brought her into the mountains that night, and had planned to kill her for insurance money to pay off his debt. In a panic, she hit him with the car, killing him. She claims to have buried his body and scrapped the car, but Ziyuan doesn't believe she could have done it by herself.

programme.title: Dark Angel - EP 10 黑天使
programme.desc: Yang Tao takes the blame and confesses to police that he had killed someone years ago, shocking everyone. Police dug up remains, as well as his cufflinks at the crime scene. Yang Tao claims that Lin Baoxiang had suspected he had an affair with his wife, asked him to meet at the mountains, where they had an argument. When he was about to drive off, he accidentally killed Lin Baoxiang...

programme.title: Little NeZha - Hero of Heaven and Earth - EP 9 少年英雄小哪吒
programme.desc: It tells the story of Nezha growing through learning both the civil and martial arts, punishing evil and promoting good, enrich the populace, and keep the world in his heart. Through overcoming one ordeal after another, he becomes a young hero, embodying the cultural spirit of Nezha: justice and courage, perseverance, and loyalty, filial piety, benevolence, and righteousness.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into the Gobi Desert with Nick Knowles - EP 1
programme.desc: Nick Knowles returns for a truly spectacular adventure, this time in the most desolate place on earth, the Gobi Desert. At five times the size of the UK, with the smallest population on earth, Mongolia is vast and remote and the stunning wilderness of the Gobi covers a third of the country.

programme.title: Code of Silence - EP 6
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. Her assessment of the gang’s clandestine meetings quickly becomes key to unlocking the investigation. But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison’s feelings about the case become complicated.

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town S1
programme.desc: Karl Alberg moves to a quiet coastal town to soothe a psyche that has been battered by big-city police work, but finds himself needing to call upon all his skills to solve the murders that continue to wash up on his shore.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 20 关键证人
programme.desc: Guo Ying is kidnapped, Zhi Ming and Yu Xuan also fall prey to assassins. When Zhi Ming wakes up, he realises Guo Ying and Yu Xuan are tied up, and Mary has a ticking time bomb attached to her. Mary tells him Lao Ying is angry because Zhi Ming refuses to obey to him. Zhi Ming is asked to choose between killing Guo Ying and Yu Xuan, or have the time bomb on Mary explode. What will Zhi Ming do?

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 3 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 4 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 25 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 7 前线追踪
programme.desc: In Singapore, crow numbers are rising, bringing noise and even attacks, prompting authorities to reintroduce culling measures. At the same time, relentless cicada noise and its presence are affecting residents, but why are Tampines Changkat residents the hardest hit? In a city close to nature, how do we truly coexist?
